description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: build-wheel, test-nixos, test, and build-sdist-validate-dists. The build-wheel job builds a wheel distribution of the project using uv and uploads it as an artifact. The test-nixos job runs tests in a Nix shell on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest. The test job runs tests on multiple OS and Python versions, including ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest, with different Python versions and constraints. The build-sdist-validate-dists job builds a source distribution and validates it using uvx twine check.
